issue_title: HTML composer will merge double newlines into one
issue_body_preview:
### Steps to reproduce

1. Copy a text having multiple paragraphs
2. Pase on the HTML composer

### Expected behavior

It should respect the appearance of the new lines. I believe it's pure UI.

### Actual behavior

It displays double new lines as a single one, ruining the format.
test_description_zh: 在 HTML 邮件编辑器中，复制一段包含多个段落（段落间有双换行/空行）的文本，粘贴到编辑器中，检查换行和段落间距是否正确保留。
expected_result_zh: 粘贴后的文本应完整保留原始的双换行（空行），各段落之间的间距与源文本一致，不会将双换行合并为单个换行。
